prompt: Vertical smartphone candid restaurant portrait of a young adult East Asian woman with a slender and well-proportioned figure, warm-white natural skin tone, exquisite oval face, dark brown almond eyes, soft natural eyebrows, clear but not overly heavy eyeliner, fine lashes, a small straight nose, pale coral-red lips with corners slightly turned up in a relaxed natural smile. Long black hair, part of it swept over the shoulder. Wearing small earrings and a silver sequined white halterneck mini dress top with fine sequins and a very thin silver necklace. Sitting in a warm-lit barbecue restaurant on a dark brown leather booth, facing the camera and leaning slightly forward, left elbow on the table, left palm cradling her cheek, right forearm on the table edge, looking directly at the lens with a soft, relaxed expression. Legs extending naturally under the table toward the photographer, with feet overlapped and resting on the photographer's knees (wearing dark gray trousers). Toes relaxed, with Hello Kitty pattern toe nail polish showing minor wear and uneven edges. The table has a large mushroom platter, several black ceramic bowls, dark dipping sauces, wooden chopsticks, small cups, and a plate of sliced meat. Background consists of the dark brown leather booth, wooden dining table, rough gray cement-textured wall, black ceiling, and several vertical copper-colored BBQ exhaust pipes. The subject is in the center, head in the top third, with the table cutting across the middle. Long perspective from the feet under the table to the foreground photographer's knees near the bottom. 3:4 aspect ratio, close-up shot with a smartphone main camera, position slightly below eye level tilting down. 24–28mm equivalent wide-angle lens, making the foreground feet and knees appear larger and the upper body smaller, mimicking true smartphone perspective. Slight wide-angle distortion on lines. Medium-deep natural depth of field; face, tableware, and foreground feet are mostly clear, while distant booths and pipes are slightly softened. No portrait mode cut-outs or exaggerated bokeh. Mixed lighting from warm-white spotlights and pendants; face lit by soft warm light from the front-top. Highlights on forehead, nose, cheeks, and shoulders. Darker background and under-table areas. Warm reflections on copper pipes and the oily wooden table. Medium contrast. Color palette of warm brown, copper, black-gray, pearl white, warm skin, and fresh green. Auto white balance slightly warm. Real skin pores, slight skin tone unevenness, arm joint textures, natural foot textures, oily wood, leather, metal, ceramic, and lettuce textures. Quality of a standard Android flagship or iPhone main camera. Handheld, computational photography auto-exposure, multi-frame night mode synthesis. Mild auto HDR lowering highlight glares and lifting under-table shadows. Limited dynamic range with fine high-ISO noise in shadows. Subtle texture smearing from noise reduction. Restrained digital sharpening on face and tableware edges. Sharp foreground, slightly softer distant details. Minor JPEG compression artifacts. Natural compositional bias. No skin smoothing, no beauty filters, no commercial retouching, no studio lighting, not seeking 8K ultra-sharpness. Real-life smartphone photo, removing AI-generated feel, aspect ratio 4:5.

promptZh: 一张竖构图的餐厅手机抓拍人像，主角为一位 年轻的东亚女性，身材苗条匀称，肤色呈暖白色自然质感，精致的鹅蛋脸，深棕色杏仁眼，柔和的自然眉形，眼线清晰但不浓重，睫毛纤细，鼻梁小巧挺直，淡珊瑚红色嘴唇，嘴角微微上扬，露出放松自然的微笑。黑色长发，部分发丝垂在肩前。佩戴小巧耳环，身穿一件 银色亮片白色挂脖迷你裙上衣，点缀着细小亮片，颈间佩戴一条极细的银色项链。坐在暖光餐厅的深棕色皮质卡座中，面向镜头，身体微微前倾，左肘撑在桌上，左手托腮，右前臂搁在桌沿，直视镜头，表情柔和放松。双腿自然地从桌下伸向摄影师方向，双脚交叠并搁在摄影师的膝盖上（穿着深灰色长裤）。脚趾放松，涂着 Hello Kitty 图案 的脚趾甲油，边缘有轻微磨损和不均匀感。桌上摆放着一大盘蘑菇、几个黑色陶瓷碗、深色蘸料、木质筷子、小杯子以及一盘切好的肉。背景为深棕色皮质卡座、木质餐桌、粗糙的灰色水泥质感墙面、黑色天花板以及几根垂直的铜色烧烤排烟管。主体位于画面中心，头部位于上方三分之一处，餐桌横跨画面中部。从桌下的双脚到画面底部摄影师的膝盖呈现长焦透视感。3:4 比例，手机主摄近景拍摄，位置略低于视线并向下倾斜。24–28mm 等效广角镜头，使前景的脚部和膝盖显得较大，上半身较小，模拟真实的手机透视效果。线条有轻微的广角畸变。中等景深的自然虚化；面部、餐具和前景的脚部清晰，远处的卡座和管道略微柔化。没有使用人像模式抠图或夸张的背景虚化。混合照明，来自暖白色射灯和吊灯；面部由前上方柔和的暖光照亮。前额、鼻梁、脸颊和肩膀有高光。背景和桌下区域较暗。铜管和油润的木桌上有暖色反光。中等对比度。色调为暖棕色、铜色、黑灰色、珍珠白、暖肤色和鲜绿色。自动白平衡略偏暖。呈现真实的皮肤毛孔、轻微的肤色不均、手臂关节纹理、自然的足部质感，以及木材、皮革、金属、陶瓷和生菜的纹理。具备标准 Android 旗舰机或 iPhone 主摄的画质。手持拍摄，计算摄影自动曝光，多帧夜景模式合成。轻微的自动 HDR 降低了高光眩光并提亮了桌下阴影。动态范围有限，阴影处有细微的高 ISO 噪点。降噪处理带来细微的纹理涂抹感。面部和餐具边缘有克制的数字锐化。前景清晰，远处细节略微柔和。有轻微的 JPEG 压缩痕迹。自然的构图偏差。无磨皮，无美颜滤镜，无商业修图，无影棚布光，不追求 8K 超高清画质。真实生活中的手机照片，去除 AI 生成感，比例 4:5。
